name: 407etr
prehideSelectors: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"])

detectCmp.exists: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"]) > div > button

detectPopup.visible: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"]) > div > button

optIn.waitForThenClick: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"]) > div > button:nth-of-type(2)

optOut.waitForThenClick: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"]) > div > button:nth-of-type(1)

if.exists: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"])

then.comment: On slow devices the React re-render can take ~1s; wait then re-click if the banner is still there

then.click: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"]) > div > button:nth-of-type(1)

optOut.waitForVisible: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"])
optOut.comment: Ensure the banner is really removed before reporting success

test.exists: body > main > div:has(> div > p > a[href$="/privacy-notice"])
